languages.text: {n}Мешанина из рваной кожи и влажно блестящей сукровицы выглядит чрезвычайно болезненно и, очевидно, причиняет раненому множество страданий. Если это действительно был осколок, то блюститель чудом избежал гибели.{/n}

{n}The jumble of torn skin and glistening gore looks extremely gruesome and is obviously causing the wounded man a great deal of pain. If it truly was caused by a shard, then the enforcer narrowly escaped death.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Мешанина из рваной кожи и влажно блестящей сукровицы выглядит чрезвычайно болезненно и, очевидно, причиняет раненому множество страданий. Если это действительно был осколок, то блюститель чудом избежал гибели.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The jumble of torn skin and glistening gore looks extremely gruesome and is obviously causing the wounded man a great deal of pain. If it truly was caused by a shard, then the warden narrowly escaped death.{/n}

{n}The jumble of torn skin and glistening gore looks extremely gruesome and is obviously causing the wounded man a great deal of pain. If it truly was caused by a shard, then the warden narrowly escaped death.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La piel arrancada y la sangre reluciente tienen un aspecto extremadamente grotesco y causan a todas luces un tremendo dolor al herido. Si de verdad se lo ha causado la metralla, ha tenido mucha suerte de escapar con vida.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The jumble of torn skin and glistening gore looks extremely gruesome and is obviously causing the wounded man a great deal of pain. If it truly was caused by a shard, then the enforcer narrowly escaped death.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La piel arrancada y la sangre reluciente tienen un aspecto extremadamente grotesco y causan a todas luces un tremendo dolor al herido. Si de verdad se lo ha causado la metralla, ha tenido mucha suerte de escapar con vida.{/n}

languages.text: {n}撕裂的皮肤与泛着光泽的血肉混合在一起，状况惨烈，显然给伤者带来了巨大的痛苦。如果这真是破片造成的，那这名执法者算得上是死里逃生了。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The jumble of torn skin and glistening gore looks extremely gruesome and is obviously causing the wounded man a great deal of pain. If it truly was caused by a shard, then the enforcer narrowly escaped death.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}撕裂的皮肤与泛着光泽的血肉混合在一起，状况惨烈，显然给伤者带来了巨大的痛苦。如果这真是破片造成的，那这名执法者算得上是死里逃生了。{/n}

languages.text: {n}L'amas de peau déchiquetée et de chairs sanguinolentes fait peur à voir. Le pauvre homme doit souffrir le martyre. Si cette plaie lui a vraiment été infligée par un simple éclat de métal, le prévôt a probablement échappé à la mort de justesse.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The jumble of torn skin and glistening gore looks extremely gruesome and is obviously causing the wounded man a great deal of pain. If it truly was caused by a shard, then the enforcer narrowly escaped death.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}L'amas de peau déchiquetée et de chairs sanguinolentes fait peur à voir. Le pauvre homme doit souffrir le martyre. Si cette plaie lui a vraiment été infligée par un simple éclat de métal, le prévôt a probablement échappé à la mort de justesse.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Yırtık deri ve parlayan kan pıhtısı, son derece ürkütücü görünüyor ve belli ki yaralı adama büyük acı veriyorlar. Eğer bu gerçekten bir şarapnel parçasıysa infazcı ölümden kıl payı kurtulmuş demektir.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The jumble of torn skin and glistening gore looks extremely gruesome and is obviously causing the wounded man a great deal of pain. If it truly was caused by a shard, then the enforcer narrowly escaped death.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Yırtık deri ve parlayan kan pıhtısı, son derece ürkütücü görünüyor ve belli ki yaralı adama büyük acı veriyorlar. Eğer bu gerçekten bir şarapnel parçasıysa infazcı ölümden kıl payı kurtulmuş demektir.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Das Gemisch aus zerfetzter Haut und glänzendem Blut ist ein grauenvoller Anblick und scheint dem verwundeten Mann starke Schmerzen zu bereiten. Wurde die Wunde wirklich durch einen Granatsplitter verursacht, ist der Enforcer nur knapp dem Tod entronnen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The jumble of torn skin and glistening gore looks extremely gruesome and is obviously causing the wounded man a great deal of pain. If it truly was caused by a shard, then the enforcer narrowly escaped death.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Das Gemisch aus zerfetzter Haut und glänzendem Blut ist ein grauenvoller Anblick und scheint dem verwundeten Mann starke Schmerzen zu bereiten. Wurde die Wunde wirklich durch einen Granatsplitter verursacht, ist der Enforcer nur knapp dem Tod entronnen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}皮膚の破れと血の光る塊は、非常にグロテスクで、傷ついた男に大きな苦痛を与えている。もし本当に破片によって引き起こされたものなら、この執行官は死を僅かに免れたことになる。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The jumble of torn skin and glistening gore looks extremely gruesome and is obviously causing the wounded man a great deal of pain. If it truly was caused by a shard, then the enforcer narrowly escaped death.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}皮膚の破れと血の光る塊は、非常にグロテスクで、傷ついた男に大きな苦痛を与えている。もし本当に破片によって引き起こされたものなら、この執行官は死を僅かに免れたことになる。{/n}
